reason: A poetic tragedy charting the rise and fall of a powerful media magnate amid decay and regret.
A faded film star’s tragic descent in Hollywood’s golden age embodies the beauty of decay.
Raging Bull’s boxer spirals into self-destruction in a hauntingly raw, introspective descent.
Taxi Driver portrays a lonely icon’s psychological decay against a grim urban backdrop.
A modern take on Richard III’s ruthless rise and inevitable ruin in a stylish, tragic retelling.
Brazil’s dystopian world bleeds surreal beauty and bureaucratic collapse in a haunting vision.
Apocalypse Now’s Kurtz embodies the poetic tragedy of power corrupted by the jungle’s decay.
Once Upon a Time in America weaves a majestic, melancholic epic of ambition lost to time.
